   442	
   443	    /// @dev Apply one tick of upkeep. Marks starvation if insufficient food.
   444	    function _applyUpkeep(Clan storage clan, uint64 tick) internal {
   445	        if (clan.livingClansmen == 0) return;
   446	
   447	        uint256 wheatNeeded = uint256(clan.livingClansmen) * ClanWorldConstants.WHEAT_UPKEEP_PER_CLANSMAN;
   448	        uint256 fishNeeded = uint256(clan.livingClansmen) * ClanWorldConstants.FISH_UPKEEP_PER_CLANSMAN;
   449	
   450	        bool hadEnoughWheat = clan.vaultWheat >= wheatNeeded;
   451	        bool hadEnoughFish = clan.vaultFish >= fishNeeded;
   452	
   453	        if (hadEnoughWheat) {
   454	            clan.vaultWheat -= wheatNeeded;
   455	        } else {
   456	            clan.vaultWheat = 0;
   457	        }
   458	        if (hadEnoughFish) {
   459	            clan.vaultFish -= fishNeeded;
   460	        } else {
   461	            clan.vaultFish = 0;
   462	        }
   463	
   464	        bool starving = !hadEnoughWheat || !hadEnoughFish;
   465	        if (starving && clan.starvationStartsAtTick == 0) {
   466	            clan.starvationStartsAtTick = tick;
   467	            emit ClanStarvationChanged(clan.clanId, true, tick);
   468	        } else if (!starving && clan.starvationStartsAtTick != 0) {
   469	            clan.starvationStartsAtTick = 0;
   470	            emit ClanStarvationChanged(clan.clanId, false, tick);
   471	        }
   472	    }
   473	
   474	    /// @dev Check if a clan is currently starving (lazy read).
   475	    function _isStarving(Clan storage clan) internal view returns (bool) {
   476	        return clan.starvationStartsAtTick != 0 && clan.starvationStartsAtTick <= _world.currentTick;
   477	    }
   478	
   479	    /// @dev Resolve an action for a clansman that is in ACTING state.
   480	    function _resolveAction(
   481	        Clan storage clan,
   482	        Clansman storage cs,
   483	        Mission storage m,
   484	        uint32 clanId,
   485	        uint64 tick,
   486	        bytes32 tickSeed
   487	    ) internal {
   488	        bool starving = _isStarving(clan);
   489	        ActionType action = m.action;
   490	
   491	        if (action == ActionType.ChopWood) {
   492	            _gatherWood(clan, cs, m, clanId, tick, starving, tickSeed);
   493	        } else if (action == ActionType.MineIron) {
   494	            _gatherIron(clan, cs, m, clanId, tick, starving, tickSeed);
   495	        } else if (action == ActionType.FishDocks) {
   496	            _gatherFishDocks(clan, cs, m, clanId, tick, starving, tickSeed);
   497	        } else if (action == ActionType.FishDeepSea) {
   498	            _gatherFishDeepSea(clan, cs, m, clanId, tick, starving, tickSeed);
   499	        } else if (action == ActionType.HarvestWheat) {
   500	            _gatherWheat(clan, cs, m, clanId, tick, starving);
   501	        } else if (action == ActionType.DepositResources) {
   502	            // Deposit event ABI intentionally stores the current tick as uint32.
   503	            // forge-lint: disable-next-line(unsafe-typecast)
   504	            _doDeposit(clan, cs, m, clanId, uint32(tick));
   505	        } else if (action == ActionType.Wait) {
   506	            // NOOP — worker stays ACTING (continuous), no transition needed
   507	            // Wait mission is effectively persistent until interrupted
   508	        } else if (action == ActionType.DefendBase) {
   509	            // Persistent mission. Registration happens atomically at order submission.
   510	        } else if (
   511	            action == ActionType.BuildWall || action == ActionType.UpgradeBase || action == ActionType.UpgradeMonument
   512	                || action == ActionType.UpgradeWall
   513	        ) {
   514	            _doBuilding(clan, cs, m, clanId, tick, action);
   515	        } else if (action == ActionType.MarketBuy || action == ActionType.MarketSell) {
   516	            // Scheduled market actions: already enqueued at submitClanOrders time.
   517	            // Settlement resolves this action slot — just complete the mission.
   518	            // (Actual execution happened or will happen at heartbeat.)
   519	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   520	        }
   521	    }
   522	
   523	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   524	    // Gathering helpers
   525	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   526	
   527	    function _gatherWood(
   528	        Clan storage, // clan (unused — no clan-level mutation in wood gather)
   529	        Clansman storage cs,
   530	        Mission storage m,
   531	        uint32 clanId,
   532	        uint64 tick,
   533	        bool starving,
   534	        bytes32 tickSeed
   535	    ) internal {
   536	        if (cs.carryWood >= ClanWorldConstants.CLANSMAN_CARRY_CAP) {
   537	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   538	            return;
   539	        }
   540	
   541	        uint256 remaining = ClanWorldConstants.CLANSMAN_CARRY_CAP - cs.carryWood;
   542	        uint256 yield = ClanWorldConstants.WOOD_YIELD_PER_TICK * uint256(getActionDuration(ActionType.ChopWood));
   543	        bytes32 woodRng = keccak256(abi.encode("wood_crit", tickSeed, cs.clansmanId, m.nonce, tick));
   544	        if (uint256(woodRng) % 10000 < ClanWorldConstants.WOOD_CRIT_BPS) {
   545	            yield *= 2;
   546	        }
   547	
   548	        if (starving) yield = yield / 2;
   549	        if (yield > remaining) yield = remaining;
   550	        cs.carryWood += yield;
   551	
   552	        emit ResourcesGathered(clanId, cs.clansmanId, ActionType.ChopWood, yield, 0, 0, 0, 0, tick);
   553	
   554	        if (cs.carryWood >= ClanWorldConstants.CLANSMAN_CARRY_CAP) {
   555	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   556	        }
   557	    }
   558	
   559	    function _gatherIron(
   560	        Clan storage clan,
   561	        Clansman storage cs,
   562	        Mission storage m,
   563	        uint32 clanId,
   564	        uint64 tick,
   565	        bool starving,
   566	        bytes32 tickSeed
   567	    ) internal {
   568	        uint256 remaining = ClanWorldConstants.IRON_CAP - cs.carryIron;
   569	        if (remaining == 0) {
   570	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   571	            return;
   572	        }
   573	        uint256 yield = ClanWorldConstants.IRON_BASE_YIELD;
   574	        if (starving) yield = yield / 2;
   575	        if (yield > remaining) yield = remaining;
   576	        cs.carryIron += yield;
   577	
   578	        // Gold bonus roll — scoped to reduce stack depth
   579	        uint256 goldBonus = _rollIronGoldBonus(clan, cs.clansmanId, m.nonce, tick, tickSeed);
   580	
   581	        emit ResourcesGathered(clanId, cs.clansmanId, ActionType.MineIron, 0, yield, 0, 0, goldBonus, tick);
   582	
   583	        if (cs.carryIron >= ClanWorldConstants.IRON_CAP) {
   584	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   585	        }
   586	    }
   587	
   588	    function _rollIronGoldBonus(Clan storage clan, uint32 clansmanId, uint64 nonce, uint64 tick, bytes32 tickSeed)
   589	        internal
   590	        returns (uint256 goldBonus)
   591	    {
   592	        bytes32 goldRng = keccak256(abi.encode("iron_gold_bonus", tickSeed, clansmanId, nonce, tick));
   593	        if (uint256(goldRng) % 10000 < ClanWorldConstants.GOLD_FROM_IRON_BPS) {
   594	            goldBonus = ClanWorldConstants.GOLD_FROM_IRON_AMOUNT;
   595	            clan.goldBalance += goldBonus;
   596	        }
   597	    }
   598	
   599	    function _gatherFishDocks(
   600	        Clan storage,
   601	        Clansman storage cs,
   602	        Mission storage m,
   603	        uint32 clanId,
   604	        uint64 tick,
   605	        bool starving,
   606	        bytes32 tickSeed
   607	    ) internal {
   608	        uint256 remaining = ClanWorldConstants.FISH_CAP - cs.carryFish;
   609	        if (remaining == 0) {
   610	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   611	            return;
   612	        }
   613	        bytes32 fishRng = keccak256(abi.encode("fish_roll", tickSeed, cs.clansmanId, m.nonce, tick));
   614	        uint256 fishRoll = uint256(fishRng) % 10000;
   615	        uint256 yield = 0;
   616	        if (fishRoll < ClanWorldConstants.FISH_DOCKS_BPS) {
   617	            yield = 1e18;
   618	        }
   619	        if (starving) yield = yield / 2;
   620	        if (yield > remaining) yield = remaining;
   621	        if (yield > 0) {
   622	            cs.carryFish += yield;
   623	            emit ResourcesGathered(clanId, cs.clansmanId, ActionType.FishDocks, 0, 0, 0, yield, 0, tick);
   624	        }
   625	        if (cs.carryFish >= ClanWorldConstants.FISH_CAP) {
   626	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   627	        }
   628	    }
   629	
   630	    function _gatherFishDeepSea(
   631	        Clan storage,
   632	        Clansman storage cs,
   633	        Mission storage m,
   634	        uint32 clanId,
   635	        uint64 tick,
   636	        bool starving,
   637	        bytes32 tickSeed
   638	    ) internal {
   639	        uint256 remaining = ClanWorldConstants.FISH_CAP - cs.carryFish;
   640	        if (remaining == 0) {
   641	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   642	            return;
   643	        }
   644	        bytes32 fishRng = keccak256(abi.encode("fish_roll", tickSeed, cs.clansmanId, m.nonce, tick));
   645	        uint256 fishRoll = uint256(fishRng) % 10000;
   646	        uint256 yield = 0;
   647	        if (fishRoll < ClanWorldConstants.FISH_DEEP_BPS) {
   648	            yield = 1e18;
   649	        }
   650	        if (starving) yield = yield / 2;
   651	        if (yield > remaining) yield = remaining;
   652	        if (yield > 0) {
   653	            cs.carryFish += yield;
   654	            emit ResourcesGathered(clanId, cs.clansmanId, ActionType.FishDeepSea, 0, 0, 0, yield, 0, tick);
   655	        }
   656	        if (cs.carryFish >= ClanWorldConstants.FISH_CAP) {
   657	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   658	        }
   659	    }
   660	
   661	    function _gatherWheat(
   662	        Clan storage,
   663	        /* clan — unused but kept positional for callsite parity */
   664	        Clansman storage cs,
   665	        Mission storage m,
   666	        uint32 clanId,
   667	        uint64 tick,
   668	        bool starving
   669	    ) internal {
   670	        uint256 remaining = ClanWorldConstants.WHEAT_CAP - cs.carryWheat;
   671	        if (remaining == 0) {
   672	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   673	            return;
   674	        }
   675	        // Determine plot index from region
   676	        uint8 region = m.targetRegion;
   677	        uint256 plotIdx;
   678	        if (region == ClanWorldConstants.REGION_WEST_FARMS) {
   679	            plotIdx = 0;
   680	        } else if (region == ClanWorldConstants.REGION_EAST_FARMS) {
   681	            plotIdx = 1;
   682	        } else {
   683	            // Wrong region — complete (no harvest)
   684	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   685	            return;
   686	        }
   687	
   688	        WheatPlot storage plot = _wheatPlots[clanId][plotIdx];
   689	        if (plot.state != WheatPlotState.Harvestable || plot.remainingWheat == 0) {
   690	            // Plot not ready — worker waits
   691	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   692	            return;
   693	        }
   694	
   695	        uint256 yield = WHEAT_HARVEST_RATE;
   696	        if (starving) yield = yield / 2;
   697	        if (yield > remaining) yield = remaining;
   698	        if (yield > plot.remainingWheat) yield = plot.remainingWheat;
   699	
   700	        cs.carryWheat += yield;
   701	        plot.remainingWheat -= yield;
   702	
   703	        emit ResourcesGathered(clanId, cs.clansmanId, ActionType.HarvestWheat, 0, 0, yield, 0, 0, tick);
   704	
   705	        if (plot.remainingWheat == 0) {
   706	            plot.state = WheatPlotState.Regrowing;
   707	            plot.regrowUntilTick = tick + ClanWorldConstants.WHEAT_PLOT_REGROW_TICKS;
   708	        }
   709	
   710	        if (cs.carryWheat >= ClanWorldConstants.WHEAT_CAP || plot.remainingWheat == 0) {
   711	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   712	        }
   713	        // else continuous
   714	    }
   715	
   716	    function _doDeposit(Clan storage clan, Clansman storage cs, Mission storage m, uint32 clanId, uint32 tick)
   717	        internal
   718	    {
   719	        // Must be at homebase region
   720	        if (cs.currentRegion != clan.baseRegion) {
   721	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   722	            return;
   723	        }
   724	        bool hasAnything = cs.carryWood > 0 || cs.carryIron > 0 || cs.carryWheat > 0 || cs.carryFish > 0;
   725	        if (!hasAnything) {
   726	            // Empty deposits are silent no-ops; no zero-delta event for indexers to process.
   727	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   728	            return;
   729	        }
   730	
   731	        uint256 woodDelta = cs.carryWood;
   732	        uint256 ironDelta = cs.carryIron;
   733	        uint256 wheatDelta = cs.carryWheat;
   734	        uint256 fishDelta = cs.carryFish;
   735	
   736	        clan.vaultWood += woodDelta;
   737	        clan.vaultIron += ironDelta;
   738	        clan.vaultWheat += wheatDelta;
   739	        clan.vaultFish += fishDelta;
   740	
   741	        cs.carryWood = 0;
   742	        cs.carryIron = 0;
   743	        cs.carryWheat = 0;
   744	        cs.carryFish = 0;
   745	
   746	        emit ResourcesDeposited(clanId, cs.clansmanId, woodDelta, ironDelta, wheatDelta, fishDelta, tick);
   747	        _completeMission(cs, m);
   748	    }
   749	
   750	    function _doBuilding(
   751	        Clan storage clan,
   752	        Clansman storage cs,
   753	        Mission storage m,
   754	        uint32 clanId,
   755	        uint64 tick,
   756	        ActionType action
   757	    ) internal {
   758	        // Must be at homebase
   759	        if (cs.currentRegion != clan.baseRegion) {
   760	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   761	            return;
   762	        }
   763	
   764	        bool success = false;
   765	        if (action == ActionType.BuildWall) {
   766	            success = _tryBuildWall(clan, clanId, tick);
   767	        } else if (action == ActionType.UpgradeWall) {
   768	            success = _settleWallUpgrade(clan, cs.clansmanId, m.nonce, clanId, tick);
   769	        } else if (action == ActionType.UpgradeBase) {
   770	            success = _settleBaseUpgrade(clan, cs.clansmanId, m.nonce, clanId, tick);
   771	        } else if (action == ActionType.UpgradeMonument) {
   772	            success = _settleMonumentUpgrade(clan, cs.clansmanId, m.nonce, clanId, tick);
   773	        }
   774	
   775	        if (!success) {
   776	            // Resources missing — worker transitions to WAITING
   777	        }
   778	        _completeMission(cs, m);
   779	    }
   780	
   781	    function _tryBuildWall(Clan storage clan, uint32 clanId, uint64 tick) internal returns (bool) {
   782	        uint8 nextLevel = clan.wallLevel + 1;
   783	        if (nextLevel > 5) return false;
   784	
   785	        uint256 woodCost;
   786	        uint256 ironCost;
   787	
   788	        if (nextLevel == 1) {
   789	            woodCost = 20e18;
   790	            ironCost = 0;
   791	        } else if (nextLevel == 2) {
   792	            woodCost = 35e18;
   793	            ironCost = 0;
   794	        } else if (nextLevel == 3) {
   795	            woodCost = 30e18;
   796	            ironCost = 5e18;
   797	        } else if (nextLevel == 4) {
   798	            woodCost = 40e18;
   799	            ironCost = 10e18;
   800	        } else {
   801	            woodCost = 50e18;
   802	            ironCost = 15e18;
   803	        }
   804	
   805	        if (clan.vaultWood < woodCost || clan.vaultIron < ironCost) return false;
   806	
   807	        clan.vaultWood -= woodCost;
   808	        clan.vaultIron -= ironCost;
   809	        uint8 old = clan.wallLevel;
   810	        clan.wallLevel = nextLevel;
   811	        emit WallLevelChanged(clanId, old, nextLevel, tick);
   812	        return true;
   813	    }
   814	
   815	    function _settleWallUpgrade(Clan storage clan, uint32 clansmanId, uint64 missionNonce, uint32 clanId, uint64 tick)
   816	        internal
   817	        returns (bool)
   818	    {
   819	        WallUpgradeReservation storage reservation = _wallUpgradeReservations[clansmanId];
   820	        if (!reservation.active || reservation.clanId != clanId || reservation.missionNonce != missionNonce) {
   821	            return false;
   822	        }
   823	
   824	        _clearWallUpgradeReservation(clansmanId);
   825	        if (clan.wallLevel >= WALL_MAX_LEVEL) return false;
   826	
   827	        uint8 old = clan.wallLevel;
   828	        clan.wallLevel = old + 1;
   829	        emit WallLevelChanged(clanId, old, clan.wallLevel, tick);
   830	        // Phase 8 event ABI uses uint32; season tick horizons are far below this cap.
   831	        // forge-lint: disable-next-line(unsafe-typecast)
   832	        emit WallUpgraded(clanId, clan.wallLevel, uint32(tick));
   833	        return true;
   834	    }
   835	
   836	    function _settleBaseUpgrade(Clan storage clan, uint32 clansmanId, uint64 missionNonce, uint32 clanId, uint64 tick)
   837	        internal
   838	        returns (bool)
   839	    {
   840	        BaseUpgradeReservation storage reservation = _baseUpgradeReservations[clansmanId];
   841	        if (!reservation.active || reservation.clanId != clanId || reservation.missionNonce != missionNonce) {
   842	            return false;
   843	        }
   844	
   845	        _clearBaseUpgradeReservation(clansmanId);
   846	        if (clan.baseLevel >= BASE_MAX_LEVEL) return false;
   847	
   848	        uint8 old = clan.baseLevel;
   849	        clan.baseLevel = old + 1;
   850	        emit BaseLevelChanged(clanId, old, clan.baseLevel, tick);
   851	        // Phase 8 event ABI uses uint32; season tick horizons are far below this cap.
   852	        // forge-lint: disable-next-line(unsafe-typecast)
   853	        emit BaseUpgraded(clanId, clan.baseLevel, uint32(tick));
   854	        return true;
   855	    }
   856	
   857	    function _settleMonumentUpgrade(
   858	        Clan storage clan,
   859	        uint32 clansmanId,
   860	        uint64 missionNonce,
   861	        uint32 clanId,
   862	        uint64 tick
   863	    ) internal returns (bool) {
   864	        MonumentUpgradeReservation storage reservation = _monumentUpgradeReservations[clansmanId];
   865	        if (!reservation.active || reservation.clanId != clanId || reservation.missionNonce != missionNonce) {
   866	            return false;
   867	        }
   868	
   869	        _clearMonumentUpgradeReservation(clansmanId);
   870	        if (clan.monumentLevel >= MONUMENT_MAX_LEVEL) return false;
   871	
   872	        uint8 old = clan.monumentLevel;
   873	        clan.monumentLevel = old + 1;
   874	        recordMonumentReachTick(clanId, clan.monumentLevel, tick);
   875	        emit MonumentLevelChanged(clanId, old, clan.monumentLevel, tick);
   876	        // Phase 8 event ABI uses uint32; season tick horizons are far below this cap.
   877	        // forge-lint: disable-next-line(unsafe-typecast)
   878	        emit MonumentUpgraded(clanId, clan.monumentLevel, uint32(tick));
   879	        return true;
   880	    }
   881	
   882	    function recordMonumentReachTick(uint32 clanId, uint8 newLevel, uint64 tick) internal {
   883	        if (newLevel == 0) return;
   884	        if (_monumentLevelReachedAt[clanId][newLevel] == 0) {
   885	            _monumentLevelReachedAt[clanId][newLevel] = tick;
   886	        }
   887	    }
   888	
   889	    /// @dev Complete a mission: set worker to WAITING, set cooldown, mark mission inactive, emit event.
   890	    function _completeMission(Clansman storage cs, Mission storage m) internal {
   891	        cs.state = ClansmanState.WAITING;
   892	        cs.cooldownEndsAtTs = uint64(block.timestamp) + ClanWorldConstants.CLANSMAN_COOLDOWN_SECONDS;
   893	        m.active = false;
   894	        emit MissionCompleted(_clans[cs.clanId].clanId, cs.clansmanId, m.nonce, m.action);
   895	    }
   896	
   897	    // =========================================================================
   898	    // WORLD PROGRESSION
   899	    // =========================================================================
   900	
   901	    /// @notice Permissionless heartbeat. Closes the current tick, advances tick counter.
   902	    ///         Execution order per spec §4.2 (CEI-safe):
   903	    ///         CEI guard: nextHeartbeatAtTs written first to close reentrancy window.
   904	    ///         Seed:      closedTick seed derived and published before step 1 so
   905	    ///                    settlement RNG reads real entropy, not zero.
   906	    ///         1. Settle missions completing this tick.
   907	    ///         2. Execute scheduled market actions for closedTick (external calls).
   908	    ///         3. Eager-settle clans touched by world events (Phase 3 stub).
   909	    ///         4. Resolve world events (season boundary, winter transitions).
   910	    ///         5. Increment tick and publish (seed already written above).
   911	    function heartbeat() external override nonReentrant {
   912	        require(block.timestamp >= _world.nextHeartbeatAtTs, "ClanWorld: heartbeat rate limited");
   913	
   914	        uint64 closedTick = _world.currentTick;
   915	
   916	        // CEI: update rate-limit guard before any external calls
   917	        _world.nextHeartbeatAtTs = uint64(block.timestamp) + ClanWorldConstants.HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS;
   918	
   919	        // Derive and publish seed for closedTick before step 1 (settlement reads it for RNG)
   920	        bytes32 newSeed = keccak256(abi.encode(block.prevrandao, _world.currentTickSeed, closedTick));
   921	        _tickSeeds[closedTick] = newSeed;
   922	        _world.currentTickSeed = newSeed;
   923	
   924	        // Step 1: Settle missions that complete this tick (settlesAtTick == closedTick).
   925	        // Bounded by 12-clan cap x 4 clansmen = 48 max iterations.
   926	        _settleCompletingMissions(closedTick);
   927	
   928	        // Step 2: Execute scheduled market actions for closedTick (may make external calls).
   929	        _executeScheduledMarketActions(closedTick);
   930

  1200	                result.missionNonce = currentM.nonce;
  1201	                return result;
  1202	            }
  1203	        }
  1204	
  1205	        // Cooldown check
  1206	        if (block.timestamp < cs.cooldownEndsAtTs) {
  1207	            result.status = StatusCode.ERR_COOLDOWN_ACTIVE;
  1208	            result.cooldownEndsAtTs = cs.cooldownEndsAtTs;
  1209	            result.missionNonce = cs.lastMissionNonce;
  1210	            return result;
  1211	        }
  1212	
  1213	        OrderCtx memory ctx;
  1214	        ctx.fromRegion = cs.currentRegion;
  1215	        ctx.gotoRegion = order.gotoRegion;
  1216	        ctx.targetClanId =
  1217	            order.action == ActionType.DefendBase && order.targetClanId == 0 ? clanId : order.targetClanId;
  1218	
  1219	        // NOOP bypass: treat 0 as "stay here"; DefendBase requires explicit home region.
  1220	        ctx.isNoop = order.action != ActionType.DefendBase
  1221	            && (ctx.gotoRegion == ClanWorldConstants.REGION_NOOP || ctx.gotoRegion == ctx.fromRegion);
  1222	        if (ctx.isNoop) {
  1223	            ctx.gotoRegion = ctx.fromRegion;
  1224	        }
  1225	
  1226	        // Validate target region (1-8 or 0=noop)
  1227	        if (ctx.gotoRegion > 8) {
  1228	            result.status = StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  1229	            return result;
  1230	        }
  1231	
  1232	        // Validate action
  1233	        StatusCode actionErr = _validateAction(clan, cs, order, ctx.gotoRegion);
  1234	        if (actionErr != StatusCode.OK) {
  1235	            result.status = actionErr;
  1236	            return result;
  1237	        }
  1238	
  1239	        // Capture existing mission state
  1240	        Mission storage existingM = _missions[order.clansmanId];
  1241	        ctx.wasActive = existingM.active;
  1242	        ctx.oldNonce = existingM.nonce;
  1243	
  1244	        // Compute travel from the clansman's current region to the order target.
  1245	        ctx.travelTicks = _travelTicks(ctx.fromRegion, ctx.gotoRegion);
  1246	        ctx.arrivalTick = _addTicksClamped(_world.currentTick, uint64(ctx.travelTicks));
  1247	
  1248	        // New nonce
  1249	        ctx.newNonce = cs.lastMissionNonce + 1;
  1250	        cs.lastMissionNonce = ctx.newNonce;
  1251	
  1252	        if (ctx.wasActive && existingM.action == ActionType.UpgradeWall) {
  1253	            _refundWallUpgradeReservation(order.clansmanId);
  1254	        }
  1255	        if (ctx.wasActive && existingM.action == ActionType.UpgradeBase) {
  1256	            _refundBaseUpgradeReservation(order.clansmanId);
  1257	        }
  1258	        if (ctx.wasActive && existingM.action == ActionType.UpgradeMonument) {
  1259	            _refundMonumentUpgradeReservation(order.clansmanId);
  1260	        }
  1261	
  1262	        if (order.action == ActionType.UpgradeWall) {
  1263	            _reserveWallUpgrade(clan, clanId, order.clansmanId, ctx.newNonce);
  1264	        }
  1265	        if (order.action == ActionType.UpgradeBase) {
  1266	            _reserveBaseUpgrade(clan, clanId, order.clansmanId, ctx.newNonce);
  1267	        }
  1268	        if (order.action == ActionType.UpgradeMonument) {
  1269	            _reserveMonumentUpgrade(clan, clanId, order.clansmanId, ctx.newNonce);
  1270	        }
  1271	
  1272	        // Install mission via helper to keep stack shallow
  1273	        _installMission(existingM, order, cs, ctx);
  1274	
  1275	        // Update clansman state
  1276	        if (ctx.travelTicks > 0) {
  1277	            cs.state = ClansmanState.TRAVELING;
  1278	        } else {
  1279	            // NOOP / same-region: no traveling state per v4.3 §A
  1280	            cs.state = ClansmanState.ACTING;
  1281	            cs.currentRegion = ctx.gotoRegion;
  1282	        }
  1283	
  1284	        // Start cooldown
  1285	        cs.cooldownEndsAtTs = uint64(block.timestamp) + ClanWorldConstants.CLANSMAN_COOLDOWN_SECONDS;
  1286	
  1287	        _clearDefender(cs.clansmanId);
  1288	
  1289	        // v4.2 §8 L758: "executes at heartbeat closing tick T" where T = arrivalTick.
  1290	        // executeAtTick = arrivalTick (not arrivalTick+1).
  1291	        if (order.action == ActionType.MarketBuy || order.action == ActionType.MarketSell) {
  1292	            _enqueueScheduledMarketAction(clanId, order, cs.clansmanId, ctx.arrivalTick, ctx.newNonce);
  1293	        }
  1294	
  1295	        if (order.action == ActionType.DefendBase && ctx.travelTicks == 0) {
  1296	            _registerDefender(ctx.gotoRegion, clanId, cs.clansmanId);
  1297	        }
  1298	
  1299	        if (ctx.wasActive) {
  1300	            emit MissionInterrupted(clanId, order.clansmanId, ctx.oldNonce, ctx.newNonce);
  1301	        }
  1302	
  1303	        emit MissionAssigned(
  1304	            clanId,
  1305	            order.clansmanId,
  1306	            ctx.newNonce,
  1307	            order.action,
  1308	            ctx.fromRegion,
  1309	            ctx.gotoRegion,
  1310	            _world.currentTick,
  1311	            ctx.arrivalTick
  1312	        );
  1313	
  1314	        result.status = StatusCode.OK;
  1315	        result.cooldownEndsAtTs = cs.cooldownEndsAtTs;
  1316	        result.missionNonce = ctx.newNonce;
  1317	        return result;
  1318	    }
  1319	
  1320	    function _installMission(Mission storage m, ClanOrder calldata order, Clansman storage cs, OrderCtx memory ctx)
  1321	        internal
  1322	    {
  1323	        m.active = true;
  1324	        m.nonce = ctx.newNonce;
  1325	        m.clansmanId = cs.clansmanId;
  1326	        m.submittedAtTick = _world.currentTick;
  1327	        m.executesAtTick = ctx.arrivalTick;
  1328	        m.settlesAtTick = order.action == ActionType.DefendBase
  1329	            ? type(uint64).max
  1330	            : _addTicksClamped(ctx.arrivalTick, getActionDuration(order.action));
  1331	        m.startRegion = ctx.fromRegion;
  1332	        m.targetRegion = ctx.gotoRegion;
  1333	        m.action = order.action;
  1334	        m.startTick = _world.currentTick;
  1335	        m.arrivalTick = ctx.arrivalTick;
  1336	        m.actionStartTick = ctx.arrivalTick;
  1337	        m.missionSeed = keccak256(abi.encode(_world.currentTickSeed, cs.clansmanId, ctx.newNonce));
  1338	        m.marketMode = (order.action == ActionType.MarketBuy || order.action == ActionType.MarketSell)
  1339	            ? MarketExecutionMode.Scheduled
  1340	            : MarketExecutionMode.None;
  1341	        m.targetClanId = ctx.targetClanId;
  1342	        m.marketToken = order.marketToken;
  1343	        m.marketAmount = order.marketAmount;
  1344	        m.maxGoldIn = order.maxGoldIn;
  1345	    }
  1346	
  1347	    function _enqueueScheduledMarketAction(
  1348	        uint32 clanId,
  1349	        ClanOrder calldata order,
  1350	        uint32 clansmanId,
  1351	        uint64 executeAtTick,
  1352	        uint64 missionNonce
  1353	    ) internal {
  1354	        ScheduledMarketAction memory sma = ScheduledMarketAction({
  1355	            executeAtTick: executeAtTick,
  1356	            commitSequence: _world.nextCommitSequence++,
  1357	            missionNonce: missionNonce,
  1358	            clanId: clanId,
  1359	            clansmanId: clansmanId,
  1360	            action: order.action,
  1361	            marketToken: order.marketToken,
  1362	            marketAmount: order.marketAmount,
  1363	            maxGoldIn: order.maxGoldIn
  1364	        });
  1365	        _scheduledMarketActions[executeAtTick].push(sma);
  1366	        emit ScheduledMarketActionCommitted(
  1367	            executeAtTick,
  1368	            sma.commitSequence,
  1369	            clanId,
  1370	            clansmanId,
  1371	            order.action,
  1372	            order.marketToken,
  1373	            order.marketAmount,
  1374	            order.maxGoldIn
  1375	        );
  1376	    }
  1377	
  1378	    function _registerDefender(uint8 region, uint32 clanId, uint32 clansmanId) internal {
  1379	        if (_clansmanDefendingRegion[clansmanId] == region) return;
  1380	        _clearDefender(clansmanId);
  1381	
  1382	        if (_defenderCountByRegionClan[region][clanId] == 0) {
  1383	            _defendingClansByRegion[region].push(clanId);
  1384	        }
  1385	        _defenderCountByRegionClan[region][clanId]++;
  1386	        _clansmanDefendingRegion[clansmanId] = region;
  1387	    }
  1388	
  1389	    function _clearDefender(uint32 clansmanId) internal {
  1390	        uint8 region = _clansmanDefendingRegion[clansmanId];
  1391	        if (region == 0) return;
  1392	
  1393	        uint32 clanId = _clansmen[clansmanId].clanId;
  1394	        uint256 count = _defenderCountByRegionClan[region][clanId];
  1395	        if (count > 1) {
  1396	            _defenderCountByRegionClan[region][clanId] = count - 1;
  1397	        } else {
  1398	            delete _defenderCountByRegionClan[region][clanId];
  1399	            uint32[] storage clans = _defendingClansByRegion[region];
  1400	            for (uint256 i = 0; i < clans.length; i++) {
  1401	                if (clans[i] == clanId) {
  1402	                    clans[i] = clans[clans.length - 1];
  1403	                    clans.pop();
  1404	                    break;
  1405	                }
  1406	            }
  1407	        }
  1408	
  1409	        delete _clansmanDefendingRegion[clansmanId];
  1410	    }
  1411	
  1412	    // =========================================================================
  1413	    // MARKET EXECUTION (Phase 2)
  1414	    // =========================================================================
  1415	
  1416	    /// @dev Execute up to MAX_MARKET_ACTIONS_PER_TICK scheduled market actions for the given tick.
  1417	    ///      Overflow is appended to the next tick to keep heartbeat gas bounded.
  1418	    function _executeScheduledMarketActions(uint64 tick) internal {
  1419	        ScheduledMarketAction[] storage actions = _scheduledMarketActions[tick];
  1420	        uint256 len = actions.length;
  1421	        if (len == 0) return;
  1422	
  1423	        uint256 processCount = len > MAX_MARKET_ACTIONS_PER_TICK ? MAX_MARKET_ACTIONS_PER_TICK : len;
  1424	
  1425	        for (uint256 i = 0; i < processCount; i++) {
  1426	            ScheduledMarketAction storage sma = actions[i];
  1427	
  1428	            // Validate clansman still belongs to the clan
  1429	            Clansman storage cs = _clansmen[sma.clansmanId];
  1430	            if (cs.clanId != sma.clanId || cs.state == ClansmanState.DEAD) {
  1431	                emit MarketActionFailed(sma.clanId, sma.clansmanId, sma.action, StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_CLANSMAN);
  1432	                continue;
  1433	            }
  1434	
  1435	            // Guard: clansman was re-tasked if mission action no longer matches the queued type.
  1436	            // Note: _completeMission sets m.active=false during settlement (by design), so we
  1437	            // cannot use m.active as a validity signal here — check action type and nonce.
  1438	            Mission storage m = _missions[sma.clansmanId];
  1439	            if (m.action != sma.action || m.nonce != sma.missionNonce) {
  1440	                emit MarketActionFailed(sma.clanId, sma.clansmanId, sma.action, StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_ACTION);
  1441	                continue;
  1442	            }
  1443	
  1444	            if (sma.action == ActionType.MarketSell) {
  1445	                try this._executeMarketSellExternal(
  1446	                    tick, sma.clanId, sma.clansmanId, sma.marketToken, sma.marketAmount, sma.commitSequence
  1447	                ) {
  1448	                // success
  1449	                }
  1450	                catch {
  1451	                    emit MarketActionFailed(sma.clanId, sma.clansmanId, sma.action, StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_ACTION);
  1452	                }
  1453	            } else if (sma.action == ActionType.MarketBuy) {
  1454	                try this._executeMarketBuyExternal(
  1455	                    tick,
  1456	                    sma.clanId,
  1457	                    sma.clansmanId,
  1458	                    sma.marketToken,
  1459	                    sma.marketAmount,
  1460	                    sma.maxGoldIn,
  1461	                    sma.commitSequence
  1462	                ) {
  1463	                // success
  1464	                }
  1465	                catch {
  1466	                    emit MarketActionFailed(sma.clanId, sma.clansmanId, sma.action, StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_ACTION);
  1467	                }
  1468	            }
  1469	        }
  1470	
  1471	        if (len > processCount) {
  1472	            ScheduledMarketAction[] storage nextActions = _scheduledMarketActions[tick + 1];
  1473	            for (uint256 i = processCount; i < len; i++) {
  1474	                nextActions.push(actions[i]);
  1475	            }
  1476	            // Invariant: each tick queue executes in global commitSequence order, including
  1477	            // older overflow actions merged into a tick that already has native actions.
  1478	            _sortScheduledMarketActionsByCommitSequence(nextActions);
  1479	        }
  1480	
  1481	        delete _scheduledMarketActions[tick];
  1482	    }
  1483	
  1484	    function _sortScheduledMarketActionsByCommitSequence(ScheduledMarketAction[] storage actions) internal {
  1485	        for (uint256 i = 1; i < actions.length; i++) {
  1486	            ScheduledMarketAction memory key = actions[i];
  1487	            uint256 j = i;
  1488	            while (j > 0 && actions[j - 1].commitSequence > key.commitSequence) {
  1489	                actions[j] = actions[j - 1];
  1490	                j--;
  1491	            }
  1492	            actions[j] = key;
  1493	        }
  1494	    }
  1495	
  1496	    /// @dev External wrapper for _executeMarketSell — enables try/catch from heartbeat loop.
  1497	    function _executeMarketSellExternal(
  1498	        uint64 closedTick,
  1499	        uint32 clanId,
  1500	        uint32 clansmanId,
  1501	        address token,
  1502	        uint256 amount,
  1503	        uint64 commitSequence
  1504	    ) external {
  1505	        require(msg.sender == address(this), "ClanWorld: internal only");
  1506	        _executeMarketSell(closedTick, clanId, clansmanId, token, amount, commitSequence);
  1507	    }
  1508	
  1509	    /// @dev External wrapper for _executeMarketBuy — enables try/catch from heartbeat loop.
  1510	    function _executeMarketBuyExternal(
  1511	        uint64 closedTick,
  1512	        uint32 clanId,
  1513	        uint32 clansmanId,
  1514	        address token,
  1515	        uint256 amountOut,
  1516	        uint256 maxGoldIn,
  1517	        uint64 commitSequence
  1518	    ) external {
  1519	        require(msg.sender == address(this), "ClanWorld: internal only");
  1520	        _executeMarketBuy(closedTick, clanId, clansmanId, token, amountOut, maxGoldIn, commitSequence);
  1521	    }
  1522	
  1523	    /// @dev Map a resource token address to its pool address.
  1524	    function _poolFor(address token) internal view returns (address pool) {
  1525	        if (token == _treasury.woodToken) return _treasury.woodGoldPool;
  1526	        if (token == _treasury.ironToken) return _treasury.ironGoldPool;
  1527	        if (token == _treasury.wheatToken) return _treasury.wheatGoldPool;
  1528	        if (token == _treasury.fishToken) return _treasury.fishGoldPool;
  1529	        return address(0);
  1530	    }
  1531	
  1532	    /// @dev Add an amount of a resource token to the clan vault.
  1533	    function _addToVault(Clan storage clan, address token, uint256 amount) internal {
  1534	        if (token == _treasury.woodToken) {
  1535	            clan.vaultWood += amount;
  1536	            return;
  1537	        }
  1538	        if (token == _treasury.ironToken) {
  1539	            clan.vaultIron += amount;
  1540	            return;
  1541	        }
  1542	        if (token == _treasury.wheatToken) {
  1543	            clan.vaultWheat += amount;
  1544	            return;
  1545	        }
  1546	        if (token == _treasury.fishToken) {
  1547	            clan.vaultFish += amount;
  1548	            return;
  1549	        }
  1550	    }
  1551	
  1552	    /// @dev Deduct an amount of a resource token from the clan vault. Returns false if insufficient.
  1553	    function _deductFromVault(Clan storage clan, address token, uint256 amount) internal returns (bool) {
  1554	        if (token == _treasury.woodToken) {
  1555	            if (clan.vaultWood < amount) return false;
  1556	            clan.vaultWood -= amount;
  1557	            return true;
  1558	        }
  1559	        if (token == _treasury.ironToken) {
  1560	            if (clan.vaultIron < amount) return false;
  1561	            clan.vaultIron -= amount;
  1562	            return true;
  1563	        }
  1564	        if (token == _treasury.wheatToken) {
  1565	            if (clan.vaultWheat < amount) return false;
  1566	            clan.vaultWheat -= amount;
  1567	            return true;
  1568	        }
  1569	        if (token == _treasury.fishToken) {
  1570	            if (clan.vaultFish < amount) return false;
  1571	            clan.vaultFish -= amount;
  1572	            return true;
  1573	        }
  1574	        return false;
  1575	    }
  1576	
  1577	    /// @dev Execute a scheduled market sell: deduct resource from vault, credit gold.
  1578	    function _executeMarketSell(
  1579	        uint64 closedTick,
  1580	        uint32 clanId,
  1581	        uint32 clansmanId,
  1582	        address token,
  1583	        uint256 amount,
  1584	        uint64 commitSequence
  1585	    ) internal {
  1586	        if (!_treasury.poolsSeeded) {
  1587	            emit MarketActionFailed(clanId, clansmanId, ActionType.MarketSell, StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_UNSUPPORTED_TOKEN);
  1588	            return;
  1589	        }
  1590	        address poolAddr = _poolFor(token);
  1591	        if (poolAddr == address(0)) {
  1592	            emit MarketActionFailed(clanId, clansmanId, ActionType.MarketSell, StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_UNSUPPORTED_TOKEN);
  1593	            return;
  1594	        }
  1595	
  1596	        Clan storage clan = _clans[clanId];
  1597	        if (!_deductFromVault(clan, token, amount)) {
  1598	            emit MarketActionFailed(clanId, clansmanId, ActionType.MarketSell, StatusCode.ERR_MISSING_RESOURCES);
  1599	            return;
  1600	        }
  1601	
  1602	        uint256 goldOut = StubPool(poolAddr).sellResource(amount);
  1603	        clan.goldBalance += goldOut;
  1604	
  1605	        emit ScheduledMarketActionExecuted(
  1606	            closedTick, commitSequence, clanId, clansmanId, token, _treasury.goldToken, amount, goldOut
  1607	        );
  1608	    }
  1609	
  1610	    /// @dev Execute a scheduled market buy: deduct gold from purse, credit resource to vault.
  1611	    function _executeMarketBuy(
  1612	        uint64 closedTick,
  1613	        uint32 clanId,
  1614	        uint32 clansmanId,
  1615	        address token,
  1616	        uint256 amountOut,
  1617	        uint256 maxGoldIn,
  1618	        uint64 commitSequence
  1619	    ) internal {
  1620	        if (!_treasury.poolsSeeded) {
  1621	            emit MarketActionFailed(clanId, clansmanId, ActionType.MarketBuy, StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_UNSUPPORTED_TOKEN);
  1622	            return;
  1623	        }
  1624	        address poolAddr = _poolFor(token);
  1625	        if (poolAddr == address(0)) {
  1626	            emit MarketActionFailed(clanId, clansmanId, ActionType.MarketBuy, StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_UNSUPPORTED_TOKEN);
  1627	            return;
  1628	        }
  1629	
  1630	        // Quote gold cost without updating reserves
  1631	        uint256 goldIn = StubPool(poolAddr).quoteBuy(amountOut);
  1632	
  1633	        Clan storage clan = _clans[clanId];
  1634	
  1635	        if (goldIn > maxGoldIn) {
  1636	            emit MarketActionFailed(
  1637	                clanId, clansmanId, ActionType.MarketBuy, StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_BUY_MAX_GOLD_EXCEEDED
  1638	            );
  1639	            return;
  1640	        }
  1641	        if (clan.goldBalance < goldIn) {
  1642	            emit MarketActionFailed(clanId, clansmanId, ActionType.MarketBuy, StatusCode.ERR_NOT_ENOUGH_GOLD);
  1643	            return;
  1644	        }
  1645	
  1646	        // Execute — use return value to guard against any future pool divergence
  1647	        uint256 actualGoldIn = StubPool(poolAddr).buyResource(amountOut);
  1648	        clan.goldBalance -= actualGoldIn;
  1649	        _addToVault(clan, token, amountOut);
  1650	
  1651	        emit ScheduledMarketActionExecuted(
  1652	            closedTick, commitSequence, clanId, clansmanId, _treasury.goldToken, token, actualGoldIn, amountOut
  1653	        );
  1654	    }
  1655	
  1656	    function _validateAction(Clan storage clan, Clansman storage cs, ClanOrder calldata order, uint8 gotoRegion)
  1657	        internal
  1658	        view
  1659	        returns (StatusCode)
  1660	    {
  1661	        ActionType action = order.action;
  1662	
  1663	        if (action == ActionType.None) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_ACTION;
  1664	
  1665	        // DepositResources: must go to homebase
  1666	        if (action == ActionType.DepositResources) {
  1667	            if (gotoRegion != clan.baseRegion) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  1668	        }
  1669	
  1670	        // BuildWall / UpgradeWall / UpgradeBase / UpgradeMonument: must go to homebase
  1671	        if (
  1672	            action == ActionType.BuildWall || action == ActionType.UpgradeWall || action == ActionType.UpgradeBase
  1673	                || action == ActionType.UpgradeMonument
  1674	        ) {
  1675	            if (gotoRegion != clan.baseRegion) return StatusCode.ERR_NOT_AT_HOMEBASE;
  1676	        }
  1677	
  1678	        if (action == ActionType.UpgradeWall) {
  1679	            return _validateUpgradeWallOrder(clan, cs.clansmanId);
  1680	        }
  1681	        if (action == ActionType.UpgradeBase) {
  1682	            return _validateUpgradeBaseOrder(clan, cs.clansmanId);
  1683	        }
  1684	        if (action == ActionType.UpgradeMonument) {
  1685	            return _validateUpgradeMonumentOrder(clan, cs.clansmanId);
  1686	        }
  1687	
  1688	        // ChopWood: must go to Forest
  1689	        if (action == ActionType.ChopWood) {
  1690	            if (gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_FOREST) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  1691	        }
  1692	        // MineIron: must go to Mountains
  1693	        if (action == ActionType.MineIron) {
  1694	            if (gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_MOUNTAINS) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  1695	        }
  1696	        // FishDocks: must go to WestDocks or EastDocks
  1697	        if (action == ActionType.FishDocks) {
  1698	            if (
  1699	                gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_WEST_DOCKS && gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_EAST_DOCKS
  1700	            ) {
  1701	                return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  1702	            }
  1703	        }
  1704	        // FishDeepSea: must go to DeepSea
  1705	        if (action == ActionType.FishDeepSea) {
  1706	            if (gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_DEEP_SEA) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  1707	        }
  1708	        // HarvestWheat: must go to WestFarms or EastFarms
  1709	        if (action == ActionType.HarvestWheat) {
  1710	            if (
  1711	                gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_WEST_FARMS && gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_EAST_FARMS
  1712	            ) {
  1713	                return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  1714	            }
  1715	        }
  1716	
  1717	        if (action == ActionType.DefendBase) {
  1718	            return _validateDefendBaseOrder(clan, order, gotoRegion);
  1719	        }
  1720	
  1721	        // MarketBuy/MarketSell: must target Unicorn Town
  1722	        if (action == ActionType.MarketBuy || action == ActionType.MarketSell) {
  1723	            if (_treasury.woodToken == address(0)) return StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_UNSUPPORTED_TOKEN;
  1724	            if (gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_UNICORN_TOWN) {
  1725	                return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  1726	            }
  1727	            if (order.marketAmount == 0) return StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_ZERO_AMOUNT;
  1728	            // Validate token is a supported resource token (not gold itself)
  1729	            address tok = order.marketToken;
  1730	            if (tok == address(0) || tok == _treasury.goldToken) {
  1731	                return StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_UNSUPPORTED_TOKEN;
  1732	            }
  1733	            if (
  1734	                tok != _treasury.woodToken && tok != _treasury.ironToken && tok != _treasury.wheatToken
  1735	                    && tok != _treasury.fishToken
  1736	            ) {
  1737	                return StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_UNSUPPORTED_TOKEN;
  1738	            }
  1739	            // Market orders are always enqueued for the arrivalTick FIFO queue.
  1740	            // _resolveAction records mission completion but does not execute any swap.
  1741	            if (cs.currentRegion == ClanWorldConstants.REGION_UNICORN_TOWN && cs.state == ClansmanState.WAITING) {
  1742	                // Already at Unicorn Town — arrivalTick == currentTick, queued for next heartbeat.
  1743	            }
  1744	        }
  1745	
  1746	        cs; // suppress unused warning
  1747	        return StatusCode.OK;
  1748	    }
  1749	
  1750	    function _validateUpgradeWallOrder(Clan storage clan, uint32 clansmanId) internal view returns (StatusCode) {
  1751	        uint8 pendingUpgrades = _pendingWallUpgradesByClan[clan.clanId];
  1752	        uint256 availableWood = clan.vaultWood;
  1753	        uint256 availableIron = clan.vaultIron;
  1754	
  1755	        WallUpgradeReservation storage existing = _wallUpgradeReservations[clansmanId];
  1756	        if (existing.active && existing.clanId == clan.clanId) {
  1757	            pendingUpgrades -= 1;
  1758	            availableWood += existing.woodCost;
  1759	            availableIron += existing.ironCost;
  1760	        }
  1761	
  1762	        uint8 plannedCurrentLevel = clan.wallLevel + pendingUpgrades;
  1763	        if (plannedCurrentLevel >= WALL_MAX_LEVEL) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_ACTION;
  1764	
  1765	        (uint256 woodCost, uint256 ironCost) = _wallUpgradeCost(plannedCurrentLevel);
  1766	        if (availableWood < woodCost || availableIron < ironCost) return StatusCode.ERR_MISSING_RESOURCES;
  1767	
  1768	        return StatusCode.OK;
  1769	    }
  1770	
  1771	    function _reserveWallUpgrade(Clan storage clan, uint32 clanId, uint32 clansmanId, uint64 missionNonce) internal {
  1772	        uint8 plannedCurrentLevel = clan.wallLevel + _pendingWallUpgradesByClan[clanId];
  1773	        (uint256 woodCost, uint256 ironCost) = _wallUpgradeCost(plannedCurrentLevel);
  1774	
  1775	        clan.vaultWood -= woodCost;
  1776	        clan.vaultIron -= ironCost;
  1777	        _pendingWallUpgradesByClan[clanId] += 1;
  1778	
  1779	        _wallUpgradeReservations[clansmanId] = WallUpgradeReservation({
  1780	            active: true, clanId: clanId, missionNonce: missionNonce, woodCost: woodCost, ironCost: ironCost
  1781	        });
  1782	    }
  1783	
  1784	    function _refundWallUpgradeReservation(uint32 clansmanId) internal {
  1785	        WallUpgradeReservation storage reservation = _wallUpgradeReservations[clansmanId];
  1786	        if (!reservation.active) return;
  1787	
  1788	        Clan storage clan = _clans[reservation.clanId];
  1789	        clan.vaultWood += reservation.woodCost;
  1790	        clan.vaultIron += reservation.ironCost;
  1791	        _clearWallUpgradeReservation(clansmanId);
  1792	    }
  1793	
  1794	    function _clearWallUpgradeReservation(uint32 clansmanId) internal {
  1795	        WallUpgradeReservation storage reservation = _wallUpgradeReservations[clansmanId];
  1796	        if (!reservation.active) return;
  1797	
  1798	        uint32 clanId = reservation.clanId;
  1799	        if (_pendingWallUpgradesByClan[clanId] > 0) {
  1800	            _pendingWallUpgradesByClan[clanId] -= 1;
  1801	        }
  1802	
  1803	        delete _wallUpgradeReservations[clansmanId];
  1804	    }
  1805	
  1806	    function _validateUpgradeBaseOrder(Clan storage clan, uint32 clansmanId) internal view returns (StatusCode) {
  1807	        uint8 pendingUpgrades = _pendingBaseUpgradesByClan[clan.clanId];
  1808	        uint256 availableWood = clan.vaultWood;
  1809	        uint256 availableIron = clan.vaultIron;
  1810	        uint256 availableWheat = clan.vaultWheat;
  1811	
  1812	        BaseUpgradeReservation storage existing = _baseUpgradeReservations[clansmanId];
  1813	        if (existing.active && existing.clanId == clan.clanId) {
  1814	            pendingUpgrades -= 1;
  1815	            availableWood += existing.woodCost;
  1816	            availableIron += existing.ironCost;
  1817	            availableWheat += existing.wheatCost;
  1818	        }
  1819	
  1820	        uint8 plannedCurrentLevel = clan.baseLevel + pendingUpgrades;
  1821	        if (plannedCurrentLevel >= BASE_MAX_LEVEL) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_ACTION;
  1822	
  1823	        (uint256 woodCost, uint256 ironCost, uint256 wheatCost) = _baseUpgradeCost(plannedCurrentLevel);
  1824	        if (availableWood < woodCost || availableIron < ironCost || availableWheat < wheatCost) {
  1825	            return StatusCode.ERR_MISSING_RESOURCES;
  1826	        }
  1827	
  1828	        return StatusCode.OK;
  1829	    }
  1830	
  1831	    function _reserveBaseUpgrade(Clan storage clan, uint32 clanId, uint32 clansmanId, uint64 missionNonce) internal {
  1832	        uint8 plannedCurrentLevel = clan.baseLevel + _pendingBaseUpgradesByClan[clanId];
  1833	        (uint256 woodCost, uint256 ironCost, uint256 wheatCost) = _baseUpgradeCost(plannedCurrentLevel);
  1834	
  1835	        clan.vaultWood -= woodCost;
  1836	        clan.vaultIron -= ironCost;
  1837	        clan.vaultWheat -= wheatCost;
  1838	        _pendingBaseUpgradesByClan[clanId] += 1;
  1839	
  1840	        _baseUpgradeReservations[clansmanId] = BaseUpgradeReservation({
  1841	            active: true,
  1842	            clanId: clanId,
  1843	            missionNonce: missionNonce,
  1844	            woodCost: woodCost,
  1845	            ironCost: ironCost,
  1846	            wheatCost: wheatCost
  1847	        });
  1848	    }
  1849	
  1850	    function _refundBaseUpgradeReservation(uint32 clansmanId) internal {
  1851	        BaseUpgradeReservation storage reservation = _baseUpgradeReservations[clansmanId];
  1852	        if (!reservation.active) return;
  1853	
  1854	        Clan storage clan = _clans[reservation.clanId];
  1855	        clan.vaultWood += reservation.woodCost;
  1856	        clan.vaultIron += reservation.ironCost;
  1857	        clan.vaultWheat += reservation.wheatCost;
  1858	        _clearBaseUpgradeReservation(clansmanId);
  1859	    }

  2085	
  2086	    function _wallUpgradeCost(uint8 currentLevel) internal pure returns (uint256 wood, uint256 iron) {
  2087	        if (currentLevel == 0) return (20e18, 0);
  2088	        if (currentLevel == 1) return (35e18, 0);
  2089	        if (currentLevel == 2) return (30e18, 5e18);
  2090	        if (currentLevel == 3) return (40e18, 10e18);
  2091	        if (currentLevel == 4) return (50e18, 15e18);
  2092	        return (0, 0);
  2093	    }
  2094	
  2095	    function _baseUpgradeCost(uint8 currentLevel) internal pure returns (uint256 wood, uint256 iron, uint256 wheat) {
  2096	        if (currentLevel == 1) return (40e18, 0, 20e18);
  2097	        if (currentLevel == 2) return (60e18, 5e18, 30e18);
  2098	        if (currentLevel == 3) return (80e18, 10e18, 40e18);
  2099	        if (currentLevel == 4) return (100e18, 15e18, 50e18);
  2100	        return (0, 0, 0);
  2101	    }
  2102	
  2103	    function _monumentUpgradeCost(uint8 currentLevel)
  2104	        internal
  2105	        pure
  2106	        returns (uint256 wood, uint256 iron, uint256 wheat, uint256 blueprint)
  2107	    {
  2108	        if (currentLevel == 0) return (30e18, 0, 20e18, 0);
  2109	        if (currentLevel == 1) return (50e18, 0, 30e18, 0);
  2110	        if (currentLevel == 2) return (70e18, 5e18, 40e18, 0);
  2111	        if (currentLevel == 3) return (90e18, 10e18, 50e18, 0);
  2112	        if (currentLevel == 4) return (120e18, 15e18, 60e18, 0);
  2113	        if (currentLevel == 5) return (150e18, 20e18, 80e18, 0);
  2114	        if (currentLevel >= 6 && currentLevel < MONUMENT_MAX_LEVEL) return (200e18, 25e18, 100e18, 1e18);
  2115	        return (0, 0, 0, 0);
  2116	    }

  2118	    function getActionDuration(ActionType action) public pure override returns (uint64) {
  2119	        if (
  2120	            action == ActionType.ChopWood || action == ActionType.MineIron || action == ActionType.FishDocks
  2121	                || action == ActionType.FishDeepSea || action == ActionType.HarvestWheat
  2122	        ) {
  2123	            return 4;
  2124	        }
  2125	
  2126	        if (action == ActionType.DepositResources) {
  2127	            return DEPOSIT_DURATION_TICKS;
  2128	        }
  2129	
  2130	        if (action == ActionType.UpgradeWall || action == ActionType.UpgradeBase) {
  2131	            return UPGRADE_WALL_DURATION_TICKS;
  2132	        }
  2133	
  2134	        if (action == ActionType.UpgradeMonument) {
  2135	            return UPGRADE_MONUMENT_DURATION_TICKS;
  2136	        }
  2137	
  2138	        if (action == ActionType.BuildWall || action == ActionType.MarketBuy || action == ActionType.MarketSell) {
  2139	            return 1;
  2140	        }
  2141	
  2142	        return 0;
  2143	    }

  2184	
  2185	    function getActiveDefenders(uint32 targetClanId) external view override returns (uint32[] memory clansmanIds) {
  2186	        uint32[] storage defendingClans = _defendingClansByRegion[_clans[targetClanId].baseRegion];
  2187	        uint256 count = 0;
  2188	
  2189	        for (uint256 i = 0; i < defendingClans.length; i++) {
  2190	            uint32[] storage clanClansmen = _clanClansmanIds[defendingClans[i]];
  2191	            for (uint256 j = 0; j < clanClansmen.length; j++) {
  2192	                Mission storage mission = _missions[clanClansmen[j]];
  2193	                if (mission.active && mission.action == ActionType.DefendBase && mission.targetClanId == targetClanId) {
  2194	                    count++;
  2195	                }
  2196	            }
  2197	        }
  2198	
  2199	        clansmanIds = new uint32[](count);
  2200	        uint256 out = 0;
  2201	        for (uint256 i = 0; i < defendingClans.length; i++) {
  2202	            uint32[] storage clanClansmen = _clanClansmanIds[defendingClans[i]];
  2203	            for (uint256 j = 0; j < clanClansmen.length; j++) {
  2204	                uint32 clansmanId = clanClansmen[j];
  2205	                Mission storage mission = _missions[clansmanId];
  2206	                if (mission.active && mission.action == ActionType.DefendBase && mission.targetClanId == targetClanId) {
  2207	                    clansmanIds[out++] = clansmanId;
  2208	                }
  2209	            }
  2210	        }
  2211	    }
  2212	
  2213	    function getDefendingClans(uint8 region) external view override returns (uint32[] memory) {
  2214	        return _defendingClansByRegion[region];
  2215	    }
  2216	
  2217	    // =========================================================================
  2218	    // DERIVED READ GETTERS (read-only, no storage mutation)
  2219	    // =========================================================================
  2220	
  2221	    /// @dev Returns last-settled state; starvation check uses currentTick (live).
  2222	    ///      Carry amounts lag until next settleClan().
  2223	    function getDerivedClanState(uint32 clanId) external view override returns (DerivedClanState memory) {
  2224	        Clan memory clan = _clans[clanId];
  2225	        bool starving = clan.starvationStartsAtTick != 0 && clan.starvationStartsAtTick <= _world.currentTick;
  2226	        uint256 lootVal = _lootValueRaw(clan);
  2227	        return
  2228	            DerivedClanState({clan: clan, isStarving: starving, lootValue: lootVal, derivedAtTick: _world.currentTick});
  2229	    }
  2230	
  2231	    function getDerivedClansmanState(uint32 clansmanId) external view override returns (DerivedClansmanState memory) {
  2232	        Clansman memory cs = _clansmen[clansmanId];
  2233	        Mission memory m = _missions[clansmanId];
  2234	        uint8 effectiveRegion = cs.currentRegion;
  2235	        if (cs.state == ClansmanState.TRAVELING && m.active) {
  2236	            // Simplified: if past arrivalTick, they're at target; else at start
  2237	            if (_world.currentTick >= m.arrivalTick) {
  2238	                effectiveRegion = m.targetRegion;
  2239	            } else {
  2240	                effectiveRegion = m.startRegion;
  2241	            }
  2242	        }
  2243	        return DerivedClansmanState({
  2244	            clansman: cs, activeMission: m, effectiveRegion: effectiveRegion, derivedAtTick: _world.currentTick
  2245	        });
  2246	    }
  2247	
  2248	    function getBanditTargetPreview(uint32) external pure override returns (uint32) {
  2249	        return 0; // Phase 3
  2250	    }
  2251	
  2252	    function quoteTravel(uint8 srcRegion, uint8 dstRegion)
  2253	        external
  2254	        pure
  2255	        override
  2256	        returns (uint8 travelTicks, bytes8 path)
  2257	    {
  2258	        if (srcRegion > 8 || dstRegion > 8) {
  2259	            return (0, bytes8(0));
  2260	        }
  2261	        if (srcRegion == dstRegion || srcRegion == 0 || dstRegion == 0) {
  2262	            travelTicks = 0;
  2263	            path = bytes8(uint64(srcRegion) << 56);
  2264	            return (travelTicks, path);
  2265	        }
  2266	        travelTicks = _travelTicks(srcRegion, dstRegion);
  2267	        path = _buildPath(srcRegion, dstRegion);
  2268	    }
  2269	
  2270	    function quoteLootValueRaw(uint32 clanId) external view override returns (uint256) {
  2271	        return _lootValueRaw(_clans[clanId]);
  2272	    }
  2273	
  2274	    function quoteLootValueSettled(uint32 clanId) external view override returns (uint256) {
  2275	        // Phase 1: return raw value (no simulation)
  2276	        return _lootValueRaw(_clans[clanId]);
  2277	    }
  2278	
  2279	    /// @notice Score preview used by season-end ranking.
  2280	    /// @dev Formula packs three descending priorities into one uint256:
  2281	    ///      (monumentLevel << 248) | ((type(uint64).max - monumentReachedAtTick) << 184)
  2282	    ///      | (min(committedVaultLootValue, 2^176 - 1) << 8) | wallLevel.
  2283	    ///      Monument level dominates; for the same level, the earlier first-reached tick wins;
  2284	    ///      for the same level and tick, committed vault loot value wins; wall level is the final
  2285	    ///      score tiebreaker before getRankings falls back to clanId ascending for exact ties.
  2286	    ///      The loot component matches quoteLootValueSettled's current committed-vault basis and
  2287	    ///      does not simulate pending lazy settlement until derived settlement getters are fixed in #230.
  2288	    function getClanScore(uint32 clanId)
  2289	        external
  2290	        view
  2291	        override
  2292	        returns (uint256 score, uint64 monumentReachedAtTick, uint8 monumentLevel)
  2293	    {
  2294	        return _getClanScore(clanId);
  2295	    }
  2296	
  2297	    /// @notice Return live clan rankings sorted by score descending, with clanId ascending for exact ties.
  2298	    /// @dev Scans at most MAX_CLAN_SCAN_FOR_RANKING clan ids to keep gas bounded. The current mint cap is 12,
  2299	    ///      so the 24-clan scan cap covers all live clans plus headroom for Phase 11.
  2300	    function getRankings() external view override returns (uint32[] memory clanIdsRanked, uint256[] memory scores) {
  2301	        uint256 scanCount = _allClanIds.length;
  2302	        if (scanCount > MAX_CLAN_SCAN_FOR_RANKING) {
  2303	            scanCount = MAX_CLAN_SCAN_FOR_RANKING;
  2304	        }
  2305	
  2306	        uint32[] memory tempClanIds = new uint32[](scanCount);
  2307	        uint256[] memory tempScores = new uint256[](scanCount);
  2308	        uint256 liveCount;
  2309	
  2310	        for (uint256 i = 0; i < scanCount; i++) {
  2311	            uint32 clanId = _allClanIds[i];
  2312	            if (_clans[clanId].clanState != ClanState.ACTIVE) continue;
  2313	
  2314	            (uint256 score,,) = _getClanScore(clanId);
  2315	            tempClanIds[liveCount] = clanId;
  2316	            tempScores[liveCount] = score;
  2317	            liveCount++;
  2318	        }
  2319	
  2320	        for (uint256 i = 1; i < liveCount; i++) {
  2321	            uint32 keyClanId = tempClanIds[i];
  2322	            uint256 keyScore = tempScores[i];
  2323	            uint256 j = i;
  2324	            while (j > 0 && _rankingComesAfter(tempClanIds[j - 1], tempScores[j - 1], keyClanId, keyScore)) {
  2325	                tempClanIds[j] = tempClanIds[j - 1];
  2326	                tempScores[j] = tempScores[j - 1];
  2327	                j--;
  2328	            }
  2329	            tempClanIds[j] = keyClanId;
  2330	            tempScores[j] = keyScore;
  2331	        }
  2332	
  2333	        clanIdsRanked = new uint32[](liveCount);
  2334	        scores = new uint256[](liveCount);
  2335	        for (uint256 i = 0; i < liveCount; i++) {
  2336	            clanIdsRanked[i] = tempClanIds[i];
  2337	            scores[i] = tempScores[i];
  2338	        }
  2339	    }
  2340	
  2341	    /// @dev Compute loot value per v4 spec §6.9: wood=1, wheat=1, fish=2, iron=4 points.
  2342	    function _lootValueRaw(Clan memory clan) internal pure returns (uint256) {
  2343	        return clan.vaultWood + clan.vaultWheat + clan.vaultFish * 2 + clan.vaultIron * 4;
  2344	    }
  2345	
  2346	    function _getClanScore(uint32 clanId)
  2347	        internal
  2348	        view
  2349	        returns (uint256 score, uint64 monumentReachedAtTick, uint8 monumentLevel)
  2350	    {
  2351	        Clan memory clan = _clans[clanId];
  2352	        monumentLevel = clan.monumentLevel;
  2353	        if (monumentLevel > 0) {
  2354	            monumentReachedAtTick = _monumentLevelReachedAt[clanId][monumentLevel];
  2355	        }
  2356	
  2357	        uint256 lootValue = _lootValueRaw(clan);
  2358	        uint256 maxLootComponent = (uint256(1) << 176) - 1;
  2359	        if (lootValue > maxLootComponent) {
  2360	            lootValue = maxLootComponent;
  2361	        }
  2362	
  2363	        uint256 timeComponent;
  2364	        if (monumentLevel > 0) {
  2365	            timeComponent = uint256(type(uint64).max) - uint256(monumentReachedAtTick);
  2366	        }
  2367	
  2368	        score = (uint256(monumentLevel) << 248) | (timeComponent << 184) | (lootValue << 8) | clan.wallLevel;
  2369	    }
  2370	
  2371	    function _rankingComesAfter(uint32 leftClanId, uint256 leftScore, uint32 rightClanId, uint256 rightScore)
  2372	        internal
  2373	        pure
  2374	        returns (bool)
  2375	    {
  2376	        if (leftScore != rightScore) {
  2377	            return leftScore < rightScore;
  2378	        }
  2379	        return leftClanId > rightClanId;
  2380	    }
  2381	
  2382	    // =========================================================================
  2383	    // UI INDEXER AGGREGATOR GETTERS
  2384	    // =========================================================================
  2385	
  2386	    /// @dev Leaderboard loot values reflect vault contents only (last-settled state).
  2387	    ///      Carry amounts not included. Full view-only settlement deferred.
  2388	    ///      View function — no gas cost for off-chain indexer/UI reads.
  2389	    ///      Iterates all clans. Canonical game cap: ≤12 clans, ≤4 clansmen each = ≤48 iterations.
  2390	    function getWorldSnapshot() external view override returns (WorldSnapshot memory) {
  2391	        LeaderboardEntry[] memory lb = new LeaderboardEntry[](_allClanIds.length);
  2392	        for (uint256 i = 0; i < _allClanIds.length; i++) {
  2393	            uint32 cid = _allClanIds[i];
  2394	            Clan storage clan = _clans[cid];
  2395	            lb[i] = LeaderboardEntry({
  2396	                clanId: cid,
  2397	                owner: clan.owner,
  2398	                monumentLevel: clan.monumentLevel,
  2399	                baseLevel: clan.baseLevel,
  2400	                wallLevel: clan.wallLevel,
  2401	                livingClansmen: clan.livingClansmen,
  2402	                state: clan.clanState,
  2403	                lootValue: _lootValueRaw(clan)
  2404	            });
  2405	        }
  2406	
  2407	        return WorldSnapshot({
  2408	            currentTick: _world.currentTick,
  2409	            seasonStartTick: _world.seasonStartTick,
  2410	            seasonEndTick: _world.seasonEndTick,
  2411	            seasonFinalized: _world.seasonFinalized,
  2412	            currentSeasonNumber: _world.currentSeasonNumber,
  2413	            nextHeartbeatAtTick: _world.nextHeartbeatAtTick,
  2414	            winterActive: _world.winterActive,
  2415	            winterStartsAtTick: _world.winterStartsAtTick,

     1	// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
     2	pragma solidity ^0.8.34;
     3	
     4	/**
     5	 * @title IClanWorld
     6	 * @notice Canonical seam interface for the ClanWorld v4 hackathon build.
     7	 *
     8	 * Synthesized from:
     9	 *   - clanworld_v4_spec.md (mechanics)
    10	 *   - clanworld_v4_1_addendum.md (locked clarifications)
    11	 *   - clanworld_v4_2_state_schema_interface_spec.md (state schema)
    12	 *   - clanworld_v4_3_schema_patch.md (final lockdowns)
    13	 *   - clanworld_v4_4_ui_indexer_getters.md (UI convenience aggregators)
    14	 *
    15	 * This is the contract surface every other workstream depends on.
    16	 * Treat field names, event names, struct layouts, and enum order as STABLE.
    17	 *
    18	 * Implementation lives behind this interface. Mocks and indexer types are
    19	 * derived from it. Do not change without coordinating with all streams.
    20	 */
    21

   617	
   618	    // ----- winter cold damage -----
   619	    event ColdDamageApplied(uint32 indexed clanId, uint16 oldDamage, uint16 newDamage, uint64 atTick);
   620	    event ClansmanDiedFromCold(uint32 indexed clanId, uint64 atTick);
   621	
   622	    // ----- OTC transfers -----
   623	    event GoldTransferred(uint32 indexed fromClanId, uint32 indexed toClanId, uint256 amount, uint64 atTick);
   624	    event VaultResourceTransferred(
   625	        uint32 indexed fromClanId, uint32 indexed toClanId, ResourceType resource, uint256 amount, uint64 atTick
   626	    );
   627	    event BlueprintTransferred(uint32 indexed fromClanId, uint32 indexed toClanId, uint256 amount, uint64 atTick);
   628	
   629	    // ----- treasury / pools -----
   630	    event PoolsSeeded(address woodGoldPool, address wheatGoldPool, address fishGoldPool, address ironGoldPool);
   631	}
   632	
   633	// =============================================================================
   634	// MAIN INTERFACE
   635	// =============================================================================
   636	
   637	interface IClanWorld is IClanWorldEvents {
   638	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   639	    // World progression
   640	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   641	
   642	    /// @notice Permissionless heartbeat. Closes the current tick, resolves
   643	    ///         scheduled market actions and world events, advances the tick.
   644	    ///         Rate-limited by WorldState.nextHeartbeatAtTs.
   645	    function heartbeat() external;
   646	
   647	    /// @notice Lazily settle a clan forward to current tick. Idempotent.
   648	    function settleClan(uint32 clanId) external;
   649	
   650	    /// @notice Lazily settle a single clansman's mission to current tick. Idempotent.
   651	    function settleClansman(uint32 csId) external;
   652	
   653	    /// @notice Finalize the current season. Permissionless after seasonEndTick.
   654	    function finalizeSeason() external;
   655	
   656	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   657	    // Clan lifecycle
   658	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   659	
   660	    /// @notice Mint a new clan iNFT and spawn its homebase in a valid region.
   661	    function mintClan(address to) external returns (uint32 clanId, uint256 iftTokenId);
   662	
   663	    /// @notice Submit one or more orders for a single clan's clansmen.
   664	    ///         Per-order failures do not revert the tx.
   665	    function submitClanOrders(uint32 clanId, ClanOrder[] calldata orders) external returns (OrderResult[] memory);
   666	
   667	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   668	    // Treasury / pool seeding
   669	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   670	
   671	    /// @notice Owner-only. Registers token and pool addresses once before seeding.
   672	    ///         tokens order: wood, iron, wheat, fish, gold, blueprint.
   673	    ///         pools order: wood, wheat, fish, iron.
   674	    function initTreasury(address[6] calldata tokens, address[4] calldata pools) external;
   675	
   676	    /// @notice Owner-only. Seeds the four Unicorn Town pools at deploy time.
   677	    function seedPools(PoolSeedConfig calldata cfg) external;
   678	
   679	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   680	    // OTC transfers (clan-to-clan, sender must be ACTIVE per v4.3 §M)
   681	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   682	
   683	    function transferGold(uint32 fromClanId, uint32 toClanId, uint256 amount) external;
   684	
   685	    function transferVaultResource(uint32 fromClanId, uint32 toClanId, ResourceType resource, uint256 amount) external;
   686	
   687	    function transferBlueprint(uint32 fromClanId, uint32 toClanId, uint256 amount) external;
   688	
   689	    function transferBundle(
   690	        uint32 fromClanId,
   691	        uint32 toClanId,
   692	        uint256 gold,
   693	        uint256 blueprint,
   694	        uint256 wood,
   695	        uint256 iron,
   696	        uint256 wheat,
   697	        uint256 fish
   698	    ) external;
   699	
   700	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   701	    // Raw read getters (committed storage, no settlement simulation)
   702	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   703	
   704	    function getWorldState() external view returns (WorldState memory);
   705	
   706	    function getTreasuryState() external view returns (TreasuryState memory);
   707	
   708	    function getClan(uint32 clanId) external view returns (Clan memory);
   709	
   710	    function getClansman(uint32 clansmanId) external view returns (Clansman memory);
   711	
   712	    function getActiveMission(uint32 clansmanId) external view returns (Mission memory);
   713	
   714	    function getMissionTiming(uint32 clanId, uint32 clansmanId)
   715	        external
   716	        view
   717	        returns (uint64 submitted, uint64 executes, uint64 settles);
   718	
   719	    function getWallUpgradeCost(uint8 currentLevel) external pure returns (uint256 wood, uint256 iron);
   720	
   721	    function getBaseUpgradeCost(uint8 currentLevel) external pure returns (uint256 wood, uint256 iron, uint256 wheat);
   722	
   723	    function getMonumentUpgradeCost(uint8 currentLevel)
   724	        external
   725	        pure
   726	        returns (uint256 wood, uint256 iron, uint256 wheat, uint256 blueprint);
   727	
   728	    function getActionDuration(ActionType action) external pure returns (uint64);
   729	
   730	    function getTravelTicks(uint8 fromRegion, uint8 toRegion) external pure returns (uint64);
   731	
   732	    function getBanditTroop(uint32 banditId) external view returns (BanditTroop memory);
   733	
   734	    function getWheatPlots(uint32 clanId) external view returns (WheatPlot memory west, WheatPlot memory east);
   735	
   736	    function getScheduledMarketActionsForTick(uint64 tick) external view returns (ScheduledMarketAction[] memory);
   737	
   738	    function getActiveDefenders(uint32 targetClanId) external view returns (uint32[] memory clansmanIds);
   739	
   740	    function getDefendingClans(uint8 region) external view returns (uint32[] memory clanIds);
   741	
   742	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   743	    // Derived read getters (read-only simulation forward to current tick)
   744	    //
   745	    // Per v4.3 §J ("Derived Getter Non-Mutation Rule"), these MUST NOT mutate
   746	    // any storage, including settlement checkpoints, cached flags, or queues.
   747	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   748	
   749	    function getDerivedClanState(uint32 clanId) external view returns (DerivedClanState memory);
   750	
   751	    function getDerivedClansmanState(uint32 clansmanId) external view returns (DerivedClansmanState memory);
   752	
   753	    /// @notice Non-binding preview. Bandit targeting is recomputed at attack
   754	    ///         resolution time using then-current eagerly settled state.
   755	    function getBanditTargetPreview(uint32 banditId) external view returns (uint32 previewClanId);
   756	
   757	    function quoteTravel(uint8 srcRegion, uint8 dstRegion) external view returns (uint8 travelTicks, bytes8 path);
   758	
   759	    function quoteLootValueRaw(uint32 clanId) external view returns (uint256 lootValue);
   760	
   761	    function quoteLootValueSettled(uint32 clanId) external view returns (uint256 lootValue);
   762	
   763	    /// @notice Ranking score preview for a clan.
   764	    /// @dev Score is ordered by monument level, then earliest first-reached tick for that level,
   765	    ///      then committed vault loot value, then wall level. The loot component matches
   766	    ///      quoteLootValueSettled's current committed-vault basis and does not simulate pending
   767	    ///      lazy settlement.
   768	    function getClanScore(uint32 clanId)
   769	        external
   770	        view
   771	        returns (uint256 score, uint64 monumentReachedAtTick, uint8 monumentLevel);
   772	
   773	    /// @notice Live clans sorted by score descending, with clanId ascending for exact ties.
   774	    function getRankings() external view returns (uint32[] memory clanIdsRanked, uint256[] memory scores);
   775	
   776	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   777	    // UI indexer aggregator getters (v4.4 additions)
   778	    //
   779	    // These are pure compositions of the derived getters above and exist only
   780	    // to reduce indexer RPC traffic. They MUST follow the same non-mutation
   781	    // rule as the underlying derived getters.
   782	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   783	
   784	    /// @notice Single-call top-level world state plus per-clan leaderboard data.
   785	    ///         Drives top HUD bar, season clock, winter indicator, leaderboard.
   786	    function getWorldSnapshot() external view returns (WorldSnapshot memory);
   787	
   788	    /// @notice Single-call complete clan rendering data: derived clan + all
   789	    ///         clansmen with derived state and active missions + plot states +
   790	    ///         defender bookkeeping. Drives the entire sprite layer.
