# Phase Super-Swarm Review — PR #199 (head 33193b7)

## SUMMARY
Not ready to merge. I found 3 high-severity issues in the shipped behavior: upgrade timing does not match §8, upgrade reservations debit the vault too early and can affect unrelated systems during travel, and the new ranking getters are not using the settled/derived path the leaderboard docs require. Coverage for the new reservation/refund paths is also thinner than the phase goals call for.

## HIGH severity findings
- Upgrade durations are wrong per the authoritative Phase 8 spec. The contract returns 2 ticks for `UpgradeWall`/`UpgradeBase` and 4 ticks for `UpgradeMonument` in [ClanWorld.sol:2130](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2130) and [ClanWorld.sol:2134](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2134), but §8 says all three build actions are “single-tick actions” and consume “one full action tick” at homebase in [clanworld_v4_spec.md:877](/home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01%20Blockchain%20Game%20Spec/clanworld_v4_spec.md:877) and [clanworld_v4_spec.md:942](/home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01%20Blockchain%20Game%20Spec/clanworld_v4_spec.md:942). The new tests lock in the mismatched timing instead of catching it in [MissionTiming.t.sol:130](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/MissionTiming.t.sol:130), [MissionTiming.t.sol:131](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/MissionTiming.t.sol:131), and [MissionTiming.t.sol:136](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/MissionTiming.t.sol:136).

- Upgrade reservations debit the vault before the worker reaches homebase, which can change upkeep and score state during travel. `_processOrder` reserves immediately before travel starts in [ClanWorld.sol:1233](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1233) through [ClanWorld.sol:1270](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1270), and the debits happen immediately in [ClanWorld.sol:1775](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1775), [ClanWorld.sol:1835](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1835), and [ClanWorld.sol:1911](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1911). But §8 says building is “not instant at submission time” and the spend check happens “if a clansman reaches homebase and attempts a build action” in [clanworld_v4_spec.md:882](/home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01%20Blockchain%20Game%20Spec/clanworld_v4_spec.md:882) and [clanworld_v4_spec.md:941](/home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01%20Blockchain%20Game%20Spec/clanworld_v4_spec.md:941). Because upkeep burns vault resources every settled tick in [ClanWorld.sol:447](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:447) through [ClanWorld.sol:470](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:470), this can starve or reshuffle a clan before the builder ever arrives.

- `getClanScore()`/`getRankings()` are not actually “live” or derived-correct. `quoteLootValueSettled()` is still a raw passthrough in [ClanWorld.sol:2274](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2274), and the score path reads committed storage directly in [ClanWorld.sol:2300](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2300) through [ClanWorld.sol:2318](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2318) and [ClanWorld.sol:2351](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2351) through [ClanWorld.sol:2368](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2368). That conflicts with the UI/indexer getter requirement that these reads simulate settlement via the derived path in [clanworld_v4_4_ui_indexer_getters.md:82](/home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01%20Blockchain%20Game%20Spec/clanworld_v4_4_ui_indexer_getters.md:82) and [clanworld_v4_4_ui_indexer_getters.md:231](/home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01%20Blockchain%20Game%20Spec/clanworld_v4_4_ui_indexer_getters.md:231). Pending deposits/upkeep/builds can therefore produce stale scores and stale ordering.

## MEDIUM severity findings
- The PR also silently retunes wood gathering/carry economics outside the Phase 8 scope. It changes the cap/yield/crit constants in [IClanWorld.sol:43](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/IClanWorld.sol:43) through [IClanWorld.sol:53](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/IClanWorld.sol:53), and `_gatherWood` now uses those new values in [ClanWorld.sol:541](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:541) through [ClanWorld.sol:545](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:545). The current v4 docs still specify `WOOD_CAP = 15e18`, `WOOD_BASE_YIELD = 2e18`, `WOOD_CRIT_BONUS = 1e18`, and `WOOD_CRIT_BPS = 2000` in [clanworld_v4_spec.md:417](/home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01%20Blockchain%20Game%20Spec/clanworld_v4_spec.md:417) through [clanworld_v4_spec.md:420](/home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01%20Blockchain%20Game%20Spec/clanworld_v4_spec.md:420) and [clanworld_v4_2_state_schema_interface_spec.md:255](/home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01%20Blockchain%20Game%20Spec/clanworld_v4_2_state_schema_interface_spec.md:255) through [clanworld_v4_2_state_schema_interface_spec.md:262](/home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01%20Blockchain%20Game%20Spec/clanworld_v4_2_state_schema_interface_spec.md:262). If this retune is intentional, the spec needs to be updated; if not, this PR is shipping an unrelated economy change.

- The new tests do not cover the riskiest new reservation logic: travel-before-build, interruption refund, death refund, or cross-tier interactions. The reservation/refund machinery was added in [ClanWorld.sol:352](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:352) through [ClanWorld.sol:359](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:359) and [ClanWorld.sol:1252](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1252) through [ClanWorld.sol:1269](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1269), but the new wall/base/monument tests always submit to `baseRegion` with builders already at home in [WallUpgrades.t.sol:55](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/WallUpgrades.t.sol:55), [BaseUpgrades.t.sol:55](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/BaseUpgrades.t.sol:55), and [MonumentUpgrades.t.sol:63](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/MonumentUpgrades.t.sol:63).

## LOW severity findings
- `getRankings()` silently truncates to the first 24 clan IDs in [ClanWorld.sol:2298](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2298) through [ClanWorld.sol:2304](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2304), but the interface still presents it as the ranking of “live clans” with no partial-results caveat in [IClanWorld.sol:773](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/IClanWorld.sol:773). It is masked by the current 12-clan mint cap in [ClanWorld.sol:1039](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1039), but it is a future correctness cliff.

- The contract now uses wall level as the fourth ranking key, matching [clanworld_v4_spec.md:956](/home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01%20Blockchain%20Game%20Spec/clanworld_v4_spec.md:956) through [clanworld_v4_spec.md:960](/home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01%20Blockchain%20Game%20Spec/clanworld_v4_spec.md:960), but the frontend spec still tells clients to sort only by monument level, earliest reach tick, then loot value in [clanworld_frontend_spec.md:169](/home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/02%20Frontend%20Spec/clanworld_frontend_spec.md:169) through [clanworld_frontend_spec.md:170](/home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/02%20Frontend%20Spec/clanworld_frontend_spec.md:170). Any client-side sort built from that doc will disagree with `getRankings()` on equal-loot ties.

## Cross-cutting observations
- The prompt asked for the Phase 9 attack-resolution interaction, but this branch still advertises bandits as stubbed in [ClanWorld.sol:47](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:47) and [ClanWorld.sol:931](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:931). Monument tests sidestep the real blueprint path by setting balances directly in [MonumentUpgrades.t.sol:24](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/MonumentUpgrades.t.sol:24) through [MonumentUpgrades.t.sol:29](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/MonumentUpgrades.t.sol:29), so the build-on-Phase-9 claim is not exercised end to end here.

- I did not run `forge test` in this pass because the workspace is read-only.
codex
# Phase Super-Swarm Review — PR #199 (head 33193b7)

## SUMMARY
Needs fixes before merge. The new reservation model is incomplete for walls, building timing is off-spec, and the new ranking getters are still reading stale committed state instead of the derived/settled path.

## HIGH severity findings
- `BuildWall` still bypasses the new queue-time reservation model, so wall progression can still happen through the old 1-tick settlement-time debit path. That reopens the vault race this PR is trying to close, and it can also strand reserved `UpgradeWall` funds if a legacy `BuildWall` reaches level 5 first. See [ClanWorld.sol:1670](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1670), [ClanWorld.sol:765](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:765), [ClanWorld.sol:815](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:815), and [ClanWorld.sol:2138](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2138).

- Upgrade reservations spend vault resources at order submission, not when the clansman reaches homebase and actually performs the build tick. The debit happens during order processing in [ClanWorld.sol:1262](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1262), [ClanWorld.sol:1771](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1771), [ClanWorld.sol:1831](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1831), and [ClanWorld.sol:1904](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1904), but §8 says building is “not instant at submission time” and is checked “if a clansman reaches homebase and attempts a build action” in [clanworld_v4_spec.md:882](</home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01 Blockchain Game Spec/clanworld_v4_spec.md:882>) and [clanworld_v4_spec.md:941](</home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01 Blockchain Game Spec/clanworld_v4_spec.md:941>).

- Building durations are off-spec. The contract returns 2 ticks for wall/base and 4 ticks for monument in [ClanWorld.sol:2130](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2130) and [ClanWorld.sol:2134](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2134), but §8 defines these as single-tick homebase actions in [clanworld_v4_spec.md:877](</home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01 Blockchain Game Spec/clanworld_v4_spec.md:877>). The new timing tests lock in the mismatched behavior in [MissionTiming.t.sol:130](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/MissionTiming.t.sol:130), [MissionTiming.t.sol:131](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/MissionTiming.t.sol:131), and [MissionTiming.t.sol:136](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/MissionTiming.t.sol:136).

- `getClanScore()` and `getRankings()` are still using committed storage instead of the settled/derived path, so leaderboard results can be stale whenever a clan has pending lazy settlement. See [ClanWorld.sol:2274](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2274), [ClanWorld.sol:2300](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2300), and [ClanWorld.sol:2351](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2351). That conflicts with the derived-getter requirements in [clanworld_v4_4_ui_indexer_getters.md:82](</home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01 Blockchain Game Spec/clanworld_v4_4_ui_indexer_getters.md:82>) and [clanworld_v4_4_ui_indexer_getters.md:231](</home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01 Blockchain Game Spec/clanworld_v4_4_ui_indexer_getters.md:231>).

## MEDIUM severity findings
- Cross-type retasking can fail incorrectly with `ERR_MISSING_RESOURCES` because validation runs before the previous reservation is refunded, and each validator only credits back an existing reservation of the same type. Retasking `UpgradeWall` to `UpgradeBase`/`UpgradeMonument` or the reverse can therefore reject an order that should succeed after refund. See [ClanWorld.sol:1233](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1233), [ClanWorld.sol:1252](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1252), [ClanWorld.sol:1755](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1755), [ClanWorld.sol:1812](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1812), and [ClanWorld.sol:1880](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1880).

- This PR also silently changes wood-economy constants outside the building/ranking scope: cap/yield/crit moved in [IClanWorld.sol:43](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/IClanWorld.sol:43) through [IClanWorld.sol:53](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/IClanWorld.sol:53), while the current spec still says `WOOD_CAP = 15e18`, `WOOD_BASE_YIELD = 2e18`, `WOOD_CRIT_BONUS = 1e18`, `WOOD_CRIT_BPS = 2000` in [clanworld_v4_spec.md:417](</home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01 Blockchain Game Spec/clanworld_v4_spec.md:417>) and [clanworld_v4_2_state_schema_interface_spec.md:255](</home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01 Blockchain Game Spec/clanworld_v4_2_state_schema_interface_spec.md:255>).

## LOW severity findings
- Coverage is missing for the riskiest new paths: legacy `BuildWall`, travel-before-build, replacement refund, death refund, and cross-type replacement. The new suite only covers at-home happy-path queue/settle, insufficiency, max level, and clan isolation in [WallUpgrades.t.sol:109](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/WallUpgrades.t.sol:109), [BaseUpgrades.t.sol:112](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/BaseUpgrades.t.sol:112), and [MonumentUpgrades.t.sol:123](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/MonumentUpgrades.t.sol:123).

- The frontend leaderboard doc is now stale relative to contract behavior: the contract uses wall level as the fourth tie-breaker, matching [clanworld_v4_spec.md:955](</home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01 Blockchain Game Spec/clanworld_v4_spec.md:955>), but the frontend spec still sorts only by monument level, earliest reach tick, then loot value in [clanworld_frontend_spec.md:169](</home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/02 Frontend Spec/clanworld_frontend_spec.md:169>).

## Cross-cutting observations
- The wall system currently has two conflicting semantics in production: `BuildWall` is legacy immediate-settle, `UpgradeWall` is reserved queue-time spend. That split is the root of the nastiest wall bugs here.
- The Phase 8.4 getters are documented as leaderboard-safe, but the implementation and tests currently encode raw-storage behavior instead.
- I did not run `forge test` in this pass because the workspace is read-only.

# Phase Super-Swarm Review — PR #199 (head 33193b7)

## SUMMARY
Needs fixes before merge. The new reservation model is incomplete for walls, building timing is off-spec, and the new ranking getters are still reading stale committed state instead of the derived/settled path.

## HIGH severity findings
- `BuildWall` still bypasses the new queue-time reservation model, so wall progression can still happen through the old 1-tick settlement-time debit path. That reopens the vault race this PR is trying to close, and it can also strand reserved `UpgradeWall` funds if a legacy `BuildWall` reaches level 5 first. See [ClanWorld.sol:1670](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1670), [ClanWorld.sol:765](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:765), [ClanWorld.sol:815](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:815), and [ClanWorld.sol:2138](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2138).

- Upgrade reservations spend vault resources at order submission, not when the clansman reaches homebase and actually performs the build tick. The debit happens during order processing in [ClanWorld.sol:1262](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1262), [ClanWorld.sol:1771](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1771), [ClanWorld.sol:1831](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1831), and [ClanWorld.sol:1904](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1904), but §8 says building is “not instant at submission time” and is checked “if a clansman reaches homebase and attempts a build action” in [clanworld_v4_spec.md:882](</home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01 Blockchain Game Spec/clanworld_v4_spec.md:882>) and [clanworld_v4_spec.md:941](</home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01 Blockchain Game Spec/clanworld_v4_spec.md:941>).

- Building durations are off-spec. The contract returns 2 ticks for wall/base and 4 ticks for monument in [ClanWorld.sol:2130](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2130) and [ClanWorld.sol:2134](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2134), but §8 defines these as single-tick homebase actions in [clanworld_v4_spec.md:877](</home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01 Blockchain Game Spec/clanworld_v4_spec.md:877>). The new timing tests lock in the mismatched behavior in [MissionTiming.t.sol:130](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/MissionTiming.t.sol:130), [MissionTiming.t.sol:131](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/MissionTiming.t.sol:131), and [MissionTiming.t.sol:136](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/MissionTiming.t.sol:136).

- `getClanScore()` and `getRankings()` are still using committed storage instead of the settled/derived path, so leaderboard results can be stale whenever a clan has pending lazy settlement. See [ClanWorld.sol:2274](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2274), [ClanWorld.sol:2300](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2300), and [ClanWorld.sol:2351](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:2351). That conflicts with the derived-getter requirements in [clanworld_v4_4_ui_indexer_getters.md:82](</home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01 Blockchain Game Spec/clanworld_v4_4_ui_indexer_getters.md:82>) and [clanworld_v4_4_ui_indexer_getters.md:231](</home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01 Blockchain Game Spec/clanworld_v4_4_ui_indexer_getters.md:231>).

## MEDIUM severity findings
- Cross-type retasking can fail incorrectly with `ERR_MISSING_RESOURCES` because validation runs before the previous reservation is refunded, and each validator only credits back an existing reservation of the same type. Retasking `UpgradeWall` to `UpgradeBase`/`UpgradeMonument` or the reverse can therefore reject an order that should succeed after refund. See [ClanWorld.sol:1233](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1233), [ClanWorld.sol:1252](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1252), [ClanWorld.sol:1755](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1755), [ClanWorld.sol:1812](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1812), and [ClanWorld.sol:1880](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1880).

- This PR also silently changes wood-economy constants outside the building/ranking scope: cap/yield/crit moved in [IClanWorld.sol:43](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/IClanWorld.sol:43) through [IClanWorld.sol:53](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/src/IClanWorld.sol:53), while the current spec still says `WOOD_CAP = 15e18`, `WOOD_BASE_YIELD = 2e18`, `WOOD_CRIT_BONUS = 1e18`, `WOOD_CRIT_BPS = 2000` in [clanworld_v4_spec.md:417](</home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01 Blockchain Game Spec/clanworld_v4_spec.md:417>) and [clanworld_v4_2_state_schema_interface_spec.md:255](</home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01 Blockchain Game Spec/clanworld_v4_2_state_schema_interface_spec.md:255>).

## LOW severity findings
- Coverage is missing for the riskiest new paths: legacy `BuildWall`, travel-before-build, replacement refund, death refund, and cross-type replacement. The new suite only covers at-home happy-path queue/settle, insufficiency, max level, and clan isolation in [WallUpgrades.t.sol:109](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/WallUpgrades.t.sol:109), [BaseUpgrades.t.sol:112](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/BaseUpgrades.t.sol:112), and [MonumentUpgrades.t.sol:123](/home/claude/code/clan-world/packages/contracts/test/MonumentUpgrades.t.sol:123).

- The frontend leaderboard doc is now stale relative to contract behavior: the contract uses wall level as the fourth tie-breaker, matching [clanworld_v4_spec.md:955](</home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/01 Blockchain Game Spec/clanworld_v4_spec.md:955>), but the frontend spec still sorts only by monument level, earliest reach tick, then loot value in [clanworld_frontend_spec.md:169](</home/claude/code/clan-world/docs/planning/V1/02 Frontend Spec/clanworld_frontend_spec.md:169>).

## Cross-cutting observations
- The wall system currently has two conflicting semantics in production: `BuildWall` is legacy immediate-settle, `UpgradeWall` is reserved queue-time spend. That split is the root of the nastiest wall bugs here.
- The Phase 8.4 getters are documented as leaderboard-safe, but the implementation and tests currently encode raw-storage behavior instead.
- I did not run `forge test` in this pass because the workspace is read-only.
